zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor de Mowbray於1361年之前出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾時，她的父親Sir John de Mowbray III20歲，母親Elizabeth Segrave22歲。她於1386年5月與John Welles 5th Baron Welles結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1417年8月13日之前，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor de Mowbray于1361年之前出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾时，她的父亲Sir John de Mowbray III20岁，母亲Elizabeth Segrave22岁。她于1386年5月与John Welles 5th Baron Welles结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1417年8月13日之前，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mowbray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern; of Norman origin): habitational name from Montbray (Manche). Robert de Mowbray was Earl of Northumbria 1086–95, but was later imprisoned and deposed for rebelling against William II.

variants.name: Mulberry
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of   Mowbray  .
Irish (Derry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maoilbhearaigh ‘descendant of the devotee of (Saint) Bearach’.

variants.name: Mayberry
meanings: English: most probably an altered form of   Mowbray  . It is also found as   Maybury  , which has the form of an English habitational name. There is a place near Woking in Surrey so called; however, this is not recorded until 1885 and is probably derived from the surname. In England this surname is found mainly in the West Midlands; it has also spread into Wales. In Ireland this form is common in Ulster; MacLysaght records that it was taken there from England in the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor de Mowbray was born before 1361, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John de Mowbray III, was 20 and her mother, Elizabeth Segrave, was 22. She married John Welles 5th Baron Welles in May 1386. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died before 13 August 1417, and was buried in Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor de Mowbray est née avant 1361, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de Mowbray III, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Segrave, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John Welles 5th Baron Welles en mai 1386. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 13 août 1417, et a été enterrée à Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor de Mowbray vor 1361 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Mowbray III 20 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Segrave 22. Sie hat im Mai 1386 John Welles 5th Baron Welles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 13. August 1417 und wurde in Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Mowbray è nata il prima del 1361 nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John de Mowbray III, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Segrave, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato John Welles 5th Baron Welles nel maggio 1386. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 13 agosto 1417, e fu sepolta a Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Mowbrayが1361年以前にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John de Mowbray IIIは20歳，母Elizabeth Segraveは22歳であった。1386年5月にJohn Welles 5th Baron Wellesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1417年8月13日以前に死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Mowbray(이)가 1361년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Mowbray III(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Segrave(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1386년 5월 John Welles 5th Baron Welles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1417년 8월 13일 이전 사망했으며 영국 링코실르에 묻혔다.

mn.before 1361–Bef 13 August 1417: 1361 оноос өмнө–1417 оны Наймдугаар сарын 13–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Mowbray nasceu antes 1361, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John de Mowbray III, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Segrave, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com John Welles 5th Baron Welles em maio de 1386. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 13 de agosto de 1417, e foi sepultada em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor de Mowbray родилась перед 1361 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John de Mowbray III было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Segrave, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Welles 5th Baron Welles май 1386 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 13 августа 1417 г. и была похоронена в местности линколншир, Англия.

Se casó con John Welles 5th Baron Welles en mayo de 1386. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 13 de agosto de 1417, y fue sepultada en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
